debug_info.goal:
f : ℝ → ℂ
hf : IsUnifAlmostPeriodic f
⊢ UniformContinuous f

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
by
  classical
  by_contra h
  rcases (not_uniformContinuous_iff.1 h) with ⟨ε, hε, hε'⟩
  rcases (hf hε) with ⟨l, hl⟩
  have hlpos : 0 < l := hl.pos
  have hε2 : 0 < ε / 2 := by positivity
  rcases (hf hε2) with ⟨L, hL⟩
  have hLpos : 0 < L := hL.pos
  rcases hε' (ε / 2) hε2 with ⟨x, y, hxy, hdist, hnorm⟩
  have hx : ∃ t ∈ Set.Ico 0 L, x + t ∈ {t | IsLinftyAP (ε / 2) t f} := hL x
  rcases hx with ⟨t, htI, htAP⟩
  have htAP' : IsLinftyAP (ε / 2) (x + t) f := htAP
  have h1 : ‖f (y + (x + t)) - f y‖ ≤ ε / 2 := htAP' y
  have h2 : ‖f (x + (x + t)) - f x‖ ≤ ε / 2 := htAP' x
  have h3 : ‖f (y + (x + t)) - f (x + (x + t))‖ ≤ ε / 2 := by
    simpa [add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using hε' (ε / 2) hε2 (y + (x + t)) (x + (x + t)) ?_ ?_
  · have : ‖f y - f x‖ ≤ ε := by
      have := norm_sub_le_of_le_add (a := f y - f (y + (x + t))) (b := f (y + (x + t)) - f (x + (x + t)))
        (c := f (x + (x + t)) - f x) ?_
      · simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using this
      ·
        calc
          ‖f y - f (y + (x + t))‖ + ‖f (y + (x + t)) - f (x + (x + t))‖ + ‖f (x + (x + t)) - f x‖
              ≤ ε / 2 + ε / 2 + ε / 2 := by gcongr; · simpa [sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using h1
                                                    · exact h3
                                                    · exact h2
          _ = (3 * (ε / 2)) := by ring
          _ ≤ ε := by
                have : (3:ℝ) * (ε / 2) ≤ ε := by nlinarith
                simpa using this
    exact (not_lt_of_ge this) hnorm
  ·
    -- distance between shifted points
    simpa [Real.dist_eq, abs_sub_comm, sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using hdist
  ·
    -- same threshold for shifted points
    simpa [Real.dist_eq, abs_sub_comm, sub_eq_add_neg, add_assoc, add_left_comm, add_comm] using hxy
